lines.speaker: Professor
lines.text: Oh, drat! This is a disaster. I've misplaced the library keys again.

lines.speaker: Professor
lines.text: If you want that application form, you'll have to help me. Find the library keys and take them to my Assistant.

lines.speaker: Professor
lines.text: Any luck finding the library keys? My Assistant is waiting for them.

lines.speaker: Professor
lines.text: Excellent work finding those keys. I trust my Assistant gave you the application form you needed?

lines.speaker: Professor
lines.text: I'm incredibly busy searching for something important right now. Please don't interrupt.
